title: ZynAutoEat
description: Auto Eat that actually helps: off-hand first, smooth until full, respects your inputs, safe around fishing rods, and fully configurable via a clean, searchable blacklist UI (toggle-all/reset). Client-side only.
body:
![Download Now!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4ab64ba62705ab6e8438b68e92167d48be1d88c.png)

# ZynAutoEat — Hands Free Auto Eat for Fabric & Forge

ZynAutoEat keeps your hunger full without stealing control from you. It automatically eats from your **off-hand first**, then main hand, then hotbar, and smoothly chains bites **until full**. It **pauses** the moment you right-click or open any GUI and **resumes automatically** afterward. Built as a lightweight **client-side** QoL mod, it works on servers that don’t have the mod installed.

> **Loaders:** Fabric **and** Forge  
> This page hosts both builds. If a Forge build isn’t listed yet for your version, it’s in the pipeline.

### Features
- **Off-hand priority** with hotbar fallback  
- **Smooth chain-eating** until full (keeps the vanilla eating animation)  
- **Respects your inputs** pauses on right-click and while any GUI is open; resumes when you’re done  
- **Fishing-rod safe** avoids accidental cast/reel between bites  
- **In-game blacklist** with **Search**, **Toggle-All**, and **Reset**  
- Action-bar toggle message: `[ZynAutoEat] Enabled/Disabled`  
- **Client-side only**; server-friendly

### How it works
- Triggers eating only in **Survival** mode  
- Chooses food in this order: **Off-hand → Main hand → Hotbar**  
- Skips any item you’ve **blacklisted** in Settings  
- Chains bites until your hunger is full, then stops  
- Pauses instantly when you right-click or open a screen (chat/inventory/etc.), then resumes automatically

### Settings (in-game)
Open **ZynAutoEat Settings** to configure per-item blacklist:
- Categories: **Danger Foods**, **Super Foods**, **Normal Foods**  
- Search bar, Toggle-All, and Reset to defaults  
- Settings are stored locally

### Controls (default)
- **H** — Toggle ZynAutoEat  
- **J** — Open ZynAutoEat Settings

### Compatibility
- **Client-side only** (QoL): works on any server; no server component required  
- Designed for **Fabric & Forge** (this project lists both)

### Requirements
- **Fabric:** Fabric Loader + Fabric API  
- **Forge:** Forge (no Fabric API required)

### Installation
**Fabric**
1. Install Fabric Loader and Fabric API for your Minecraft version  
2. Put the ZynAutoEat `.jar` into your `mods/` folder  
3. Launch the game, press **H** to enable, **J** to configure

**Forge**
1. Install the Forge Loader for your Minecraft version  
2. Put the ZynAutoEat Forge `.jar` into your `mods/` folder  
3. Launch the game, press **H** to enable, **J** to configure

### FAQ
- **Will it eat “bad” foods (e.g., Rotten Flesh)?**  
  Not if you blacklist them. The Settings screen ships with sensible defaults you can tweak anytime.
- **Does it work with custom modded foods?**  
  Yes — if an item has a standard `FoodComponent`, it can be used (unless blacklisted).
- **Will it fight my right-click (RMB)?**  
  No. The mod pauses immediately while you’re holding right-click and resumes after you release.
